name: Flewber Global Inc.
description: Flewber Global Inc. is a technology-powered private aviation services company. The company provides private air charter services through its mobile application, Flewber, and its subsidiary, Flewber Luxe. Flewber utilizes its proprietary technology platform to connect travelers with private flights, offering on-demand booking, regional air mobility, and charter management solutions designed to make private aviation more accessible and efficient.
